codeReview.summary: The CLI command registration and basic import/export wiring are in place, but the new verification logic is not trustworthy for scoped exports. It can report false passes by comparing export entities against unrelated database rows and global legacy mappings rather than only the rows imported from the provided export.

issues.description: Team/label/user verification can incorrectly pass when the export contains entities that were never imported. The code checks `matchedCount >= exportCount` against global DB rows and reports the total DB table count, so any pre-existing row with the same key/name/email satisfies the verification even if there is no corresponding legacy mapping from this export. This violates the requirement to compare imported data against the provided export source and can hide missing imports.

Workflow state verification is also global instead of export-scoped. It loads all `workflow_state` mappings in the database and treats an exported state as verified if its old ID appears anywhere in that global mapping set. When multiple imports exist, stale mappings from a previous run can make `import verify --file <dir>` pass even if the states for this specific export were never imported into the current database state.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The `cli-worker` skill says to read `docs/legacy/05_Linear_全量导出_迁移与导入方案.md` before implementing import/export features, but the transcript skeleton for this feature never shows that file being read. The worker proceeded by reverse-engineering the existing code instead.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Skill file `.factory/skills/cli-worker/SKILL.md` step 1 requires reading the import/export spec; the reviewed transcript skeleton for worker session `2361891d-b278-4dbb-8d25-c8db6c45032d` contains reads of mission files and CLI/server sources, but no read of `docs/legacy/05_Linear_全量导出_迁移与导入方案.md`.

summary: Reviewed commit `d84a73e` for `import-cli-commands`. Found two high-confidence blocking correctness issues in `import verify`: several entity checks are not scoped to the provided export and can produce false PASS results by matching unrelated existing rows or stale mappings elsewhere in the database. Report written for validator follow-up.
